title: Adom Google
brief: Drive your whole Google Workspace from the terminal — Gmail, Drive, Sheets, Docs, Slides, Calendar, Tasks, Chat + any Google API.
sample_prompts: read my gmail and summarize anything urgent
search my Google Drive for the latest quote
make a Google Sheet of this BOM
build a Google Slides deck for the board review
post to Google Chat that the boards shipped
discovery_triggers: find a file in my drive
message my team on google chat
discovery_pitch: Drive your whole Google Workspace from the terminal through your AI — read Gmail (and its attachments), search Drive, build Sheets/Docs/Slides, manage Calendar & Tasks, and post to Google Chat as yourself. One OAuth, any Google API.
